title: SQL: Mserver crashes on division by 0
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_division (a INT, b INT, c FLOAT, d VARCHAR(10));
SELECT a / NULLIF(b, 0) FROM test_division WHERE c > 2.0;
SELECT d, a / NULLIF(c, 0) FROM test_division WHERE b IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Division by zero in SQL query causes crash
